backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing school activity management with CRUD operations for activities, user registration, participant tracking, and role-based access control using authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, activity creation, detail view, registration, filtering, calendar) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the school activity hub application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the education-focused design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the School Activity Hub application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with five routes (home, create, detail, my-activities, calendar), theme provider, authentication initialization, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ActivityCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying activity summary with category badge, date/time/location icons, participant count, and click navigation to detail page.
Filter controls component with search input, category dropdown, date range pickers, and clear functionality for filtering activities.
frontend/src/components/CalendarGrid.tsx: Renders a monthly calendar grid showing activities as colored dots by category, with navigation controls and click handlers for days with activities.
frontend/src/components/DayActivitiesMod: Modal dialog that displays all activities for a selected date, with clickable activity cards that navigate to activity detail pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header, navigation, authentication controls, mobile menu, and footer with social links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivityFilter.ts: Custom hook that filters activities by category, search query, and date range based on provided filter state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login, logout, and identity management using DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching activities, activity details, user registrations, and mutations for creating activities and registering for them.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color variables for light/dark themes using an orange and teal education-themed palette, plus custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActivityDetailPage.ts: Displays detailed information about a single activity including title, description, date, location, and organizer. Allows authenticated users to register for the activity and shows registration status.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Renders a calendar grid view of upcoming activities and opens a modal showing activities for a selected date. Uses CalendarGrid and DayActivitiesModal components.
frontend/src/pages/CreateActivityPage.ts: Provides a form for authenticated users to create new activities with fields for title, description, date, time, location, and category. Converts date to nanosecond timestamp for backend storage.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying a hero banner, activity filters, and a grid of upcoming activities. Shows create activity button for authenticated users and handles empty states.
frontend/src/pages/MyActivitiesPage.tsx: Displays activities the authenticated user has registered for by fetching registration IDs and rendering ActivityCard components. Shows empty state if no registrations exist.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes functions to get, store, clear, and persist parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius utilities, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for "School Activity Hub" tracking 7 implemented features (homepage, activity creation/viewing/registration, filtering/search, calendar view, and visual theme) with one pending feature request and image requirements for hero banner and category icons.
